# freeswitch_domain (Data Source)

Look up an existing FreeSWITCH domain by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "freeswitch_domain" "main" {
  name = "192.168.48.143"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
- `variables` (Map of String)
